global_description: Medium-sized mammal with a bulky, woolly body, typically white or off-white, with a rounded face, short legs, and a short tail. The wool is dense and curly, covering most of the body, providing insulation.

part_details.head: Rounded with a gentle expression, often with small ears and a short muzzle.
part_details.body: Bulky, covered in dense, curly wool, usually white or off-white.
part_details.legs: Short and sturdy, supporting the heavy body.
part_details.wool: Thick, curly, and insulating, covering most of the body.
